text: Bank of America continues to demonstrate investment banking competitiveness through major transaction participation. On October 21, 2025, the bank was named among the arrangers for a $12.25 billion debt facility supporting Blackstone and TPG's Hologic buyout, working alongside Citigroup and Barclays. This transaction underscores BAC's positioning in large-scale corporate finance deals during Q3 2025, a period when peer institutions including JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs reported record investment banking fees.
